title: Nintendo has raised its employees base salary by 10%
abstract: Hey, have you heard that Nintendo bumped up its employees' base salary by 10%? It's like leveling up in a game—now your paycheck is bigger! Imagine suddenly seeing an extra amount on your pay stub; it feels real and exciting, just like in Animal Crossing, but this time, the rewards are for real. You can now collect both virtual and real-world treasures!
abstract_zh: 嘿，你是不是也听说了？任天堂直接给你加薪10%，从此游戏不只是乐趣，更是财富！想象一下，你的工资单上突然多出了一笔，是不是感觉像是在玩儿《动物之森》，但这次是真的赚到了！这下，你不仅能在游戏中收获金币，还能用现实中的钱买遍全世界！
